====Pokémon====
{{anchor|Cherubi 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Gardenia
|pkmn=Cherubi
|type1=Grass
|img=Gardenia Cherubi DPA.png
|epnum=DPA04
|epname=Win with Teamwork!!
|desc={{p|Cherubi}} was the first Pokémon Gardenia used in the Gym battle against Hareta. It went up against his {{TP|Hareta|Shinx}} and was able to put up a great fight as it was finished off with {{p|Shinx}}'s {{m|Bite}}. It was revealed that Cherubi used Leech Seed as part of the laid-out traps when [[Hareta's Piplup]] got to battle.

Cherubi's only known move is {{m|Leech Seed}}.}}

{{anchor|Turtwig 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Gardenia
|pkmn=Turtwig
|type1=Grass
|img=Gardenia Turtwig DPA.png
|epnum=DPA04
|epname=Win with Teamwork!!
|desc={{p|Turtwig}} was the second Pokémon used in the Gym battle. It went up against Hareta's Shinx and allowed itself to get defeated by Shinx's {{m|Spark}}.

Turtwig's only known move is {{m|Grass Knot}}.}}

{{anchor|Roserade 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Gardenia
|pkmn=Roserade
|type1=Grass
|type2=Poison
|img=Gardenia Roserade DPA.png
|epnum=DPA04
|epname=Win with Teamwork!!
|desc={{p|Roserade}} is Gardenia's strongest Pokémon. It was the third Pokémon used in the Gym battle. It managed to defeat Hareta's Shinx due to the trap that her Turtwig set up. It also battled with {{p|Misdreavus}} where Misdreavus used {{m|Spite}} to lower the PP of Magical Leaf. Misdreavus too got defeated by Roserade which left {{TP|Hareta|Piplup}} as the last Pokémon. After narrowly dodging Roserade's attacks, Piplup won the battle with an airborne {{m|Peck}} as Roserade could no longer use Magical Leaf to protect itself.

Roserade's only known move is {{m|Magical Leaf}}.}}
